parameters.query: SELECT email FROM suppression_list WHERE email = $1

UPDATE email_queue
SET status = 'sent', esp_message_id = $1, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $2::uuid

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_queue_id, contact_id, campaign_id, event_type, raw_payload, occurred_at)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, 'sent', $4::jsonb, NOW())

SELECT * FROM drip_steps
WHERE campaign_id = $1::uuid
  AND step_order   = $2::int + 1

INSERT INTO email_queue
  (subscriber_sequence_id, campaign_id, contact_id, step_order, scheduled_for, status)
VALUES
  ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, $4::int,
   NOW() + ($5::int || ' days')::INTERVAL,
   'pending');

UPDATE subscriber_sequences
SET current_step_order = $4::int, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid

UPDATE subscriber_sequences
SET status = 'completed', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid
